narrative_votes_with_evidence.narrative_name: CC: Criticism of institutions and authorities
narrative_votes_with_evidence.evidence_quote: White Garcetti was away, Los Angeles continued to struggle with the high crime and homelessness that have come to define his legacy, as well as a crisis in the City Council triggered by racist comments from City Council members within Garcetti’s party.
narrative_votes_with_evidence.reasoning: This quote criticizes Mayor Garcetti's competence and priorities by suggesting his international focus on climate comes at the expense of addressing pressing domestic crises, thereby challenging his integrity and effectiveness as an authority figure.

narrative_votes_with_evidence.evidence_quote: It is not clear why the conference could not be held remotely.

narrative_votes_with_evidence.narrative_name: CC: Criticism of institutions and authorities
narrative_votes_with_evidence.evidence_quote: though L.A.’s infrastructure is not widely considered “high-quality.” A proposed high-speed rail between L.A. and San Francisco has been largely canceled, and current passenger rail service from L.A. to San Diego has been suspended because of a potential landslide hazard.
narrative_votes_with_evidence.reasoning: This quote challenges the competence and credibility of the mayor and his administration by pointing out the disconnect between his presentation on 'high-quality urban transportation infrastructure' and the reality of failures and problems in Los Angeles's own infrastructure projects.

narrative_votes_with_evidence.evidence_quote: White Garcetti was away, Los Angeles continued to struggle with the high crime and homelessness that have come to define his legacy, as well as a crisis in the City Council triggered by racist comments from City Council members within Garcetti’s party.
narrative_votes_with_evidence.reasoning: This statement criticizes the climate movement and its leaders by implying that their focus on global climate summits is a distraction from more immediate and serious local governance failures, thereby challenging the movement's priorities and impact.

narrative_votes_with_evidence.evidence_quote: burning fossil fuels on an international flight rather than attending remotely and attending to pressing issues at home.
narrative_votes_with_evidence.reasoning: The text directly criticizes the mayor's decision to travel for a climate summit, framing it as hypocritical and questioning the effectiveness and practical impact of such climate policy actions.

narrative_votes_with_evidence.narrative_name: CC: Criticism of institutions and authorities
narrative_votes_with_evidence.evidence_quote: White Garcetti was away, Los Angeles continued to struggle with the high crime and homelessness that have come to define his legacy, as well as a crisis in the City Council triggered by racist comments from City Council members within Garcetti’s party.
narrative_votes_with_evidence.reasoning: This quote challenges the competence and priorities of Mayor Garcetti, suggesting he is neglecting pressing domestic issues (crime, homelessness, political crisis) in favor of international climate talks, thereby criticizing his leadership and the institution of his office.

narrative_votes_with_evidence.evidence_quote: It is not clear why the conference could not be held remotely.
narrative_votes_with_evidence.reasoning: This statement implicitly challenges the motives and practical choices of the climate movement (represented by the C40 summit), suggesting its actions (requiring in-person attendance) are inconsistent with its stated goals of reducing emissions.

narrative_votes_with_evidence.evidence_quote: A proposed high-speed rail between L.A. and San Francisco has been largely canceled, and current passenger rail service from L.A. to San Diego has been suspended because of a potential landslide hazard.
narrative_votes_with_evidence.reasoning: This quote highlights failures and problems with specific green transportation infrastructure projects, expressing skepticism about their viability and implementation, which aligns with the narrative of controversy surrounding green technologies.
